title: Creative Town Run Manifest
description: Provenance metadata for Creative Town proposal generation (non-authoritative).

ct_boundary_digest.description: SHA256 hash of canonical(proposal_bundle || ct_run_manifest) for immutable record.

proposals_count.description: Total number of proposals in this run.

ct_version.description: Creative Town code version (for diagnostics only, non-sovereign).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when CT run completed.

metadata.description: Optional non-sovereign metadata (ct_version, generation settings, etc.).
